rationale: The cited paper is plausibly relevant because it provides cross-category household-level elasticity estimates and demand-modeling evidence in grocery CPG, which could inform the citing paper’s category-heterogeneity or price-response assumptions. However, the available match evidence is only a bare DOI reference (no in-text citation context), and the core research focus differs (macroeconomic elasticity cyclicality vs. cross-retailer promotion calendar timing), so substantive use cannot be confirmed from current evidence.
